历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21710 → 41239 → 34853 → 33187 → 33070. In 2022, the ranking gradually stabilized around 33000 in recent three years, with a baseline of about 33070 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 2478 in 2021, 2716 in 2022, 2580 in 2023, 2510 in 2024, and 2625 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 2254, a significant reduction of about 14.1% compared to 2025, which will intensify competition due to fewer admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 46th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable position in the 40–46 range in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), but in 2024 it was positive (improved cafeteria). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 857,000, indicating medium-to-high short video exposure. No significant admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A- in Physical Education and A- in Pharmacy, with a total of 2 A- or above disciplines. Strong disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering and Clinical Medicine attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 521,000, with an estimated 379,000 in the Physics Category (based on a recent proportion of about 72.8%), an increase of about 45% compared to 261,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, providing obvious geographical convenience for local students. The university enrolls about 18–22% of its students from the province, making it a major local recruiter, and local students have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings around 33000 in recent three years, the significant reduction of about 14.1% in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the estimated increase of about 45% in the total number of Physics Category examinees in the province, competition is expected to intensify significantly based on the 2025 baseline of 33070. The predicted minimum ranking is about 31066, with a range of 30566–31566.

If your ranking is close to the upper bound (above 31500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 46th in 2026, with rankings stable in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but in 2024 it was somewhat positive (cafeteria improvements); Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 857,000; no obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education received A-, Pharmacy received A-, with a total of 2 disciplines at A- or above; although Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and other liberal arts-related disciplines did not receive A-level ratings, they are traditional strengths of the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment reduction of about 8.1% in 2026, and the estimated increase of about 46% in the total number of provincial History Category examinees, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6765 places; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6637, with a range of 6137–7137.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 苏州大学医学类在江苏省2021至2025年的最低录取位次分别为29196、9867、7093、29982、33986。其中2022-2023年位次异常偏低，系因当时医学类包含历史类护理学专业拉低 了整体位次；2024年新高考选科改革后，医学类全部要求'物理+化学'，位次回归至29982，2025年进一步降至33986。招生计划方面，2021年430人、2022年410人、2023年464人、 2024年419人、2025年476人，呈波动上升趋势。2026年计划扩至502人，较2025年增加26人，增幅约5.46%，扩招力度较2024→2025年（+13.6%）有所收窄，但仍属正向扩招，对位 次有持续下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是江苏省属重点综合性大学，国家'211工程'重点建设高校，入选'双一流'建设高校名单。学校医学教育历史悠久，临床医学、放射医学等学科积淀深厚，在长三角地区 具有较高的社会认可度和就业竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。苏州地处长三角核心区域，经济发达、医疗资源丰富，对省内考生吸引力强。苏州大学医学类2 026年在江苏省投放502个招生名额，招生规模在省内同类院校中位居前列，为不同分数段考生提供了较多选择空间。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年苏州大学医学类最低录取位次为35130名，对应位次区间为34630至35630名。2026年扩招5.46%使位次较2025年继续小幅下滑， 但下滑幅度因扩招力度减弱而趋缓。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical category in Jiangsu Province from 2021 to 2025 were 29196, 9867, 7093, 29982, and 33986 respectively. The abnormally low rankings in 2022-2023 were due to the inclusion of history-based nursing majors, which lowered the overall ranking. After the new Gaokao subject selection reform in 2024, all medical majors required 'Physics + Chemistry', and the ranking returned to 29982, further dropping to 33986 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 430 students in 2021, 410 in 2022, 464 in 2023, 419 in 2024, and 476 in 2025, showing a fluctuating upward trend. The 2026 plan expands to 502 students, an increase of 26 students compared to 2025, with an increase rate of about 5.46%. Although the expansion rate is narrower than the 2024→2025 increase (+13.6%), it is still a positive expansion, continuously pulling down the ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key comprehensive university under Jiangsu Province, a national '211 Project' key construction university, and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. The university has a long history of medical education, with deep accumulations in clinical medicine, radiology, and other disciplines, enjoying high social recognition and employment competitiveness in the Yangtze River Delta region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology facing fierce competition. Suzhou is located in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with a developed economy and abundant medical resources, making it highly attractive to candidates within the province. Soochow University's medical category plans to enroll 502 students in Jiangsu Province in 2026, with an enrollment scale ranking among the top among similar institutions in the province, providing a wide range of choices for candidates at different score levels.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical category in 2026 is 35130, with a corresponding ranking range of 34630 to 35630. The 5.46% enrollment expansion in 2026 will cause the ranking to continue to decline slightly compared to 2025, but the decline rate will slow down due to the weakened expansion intensity.
